play.title: Play
play.description: Our invitation to stop, breathe and enjoy the moment. Let yourself be surprised by the beauty of simple things.
play.subtitle1: Relax in the garden and pool
play.paragraph1: Here you can savor the taste of a true holiday immersed in nature and in the silence of the Tuscan countryside, made of conviviality and walks

SezioneGallery.subTitle: Pool in the Farmyard
SezioneGallery.title: A dive into relaxation
description: The pool is located in the part of the estate where wheat was once processed, the farmyard. It is 12 meters by 6 meters large and reserved exclusively for our guests

SezioneGallery2.subTitle: Walks in nature
SezioneGallery2.title: The garden and the Tuscan countryside
description: It’s not a real holiday with us unless you immerse yourself in the scents of the countryside

activities.description: Guests of the agriturismo can visit many medieval villages, some of which are visible in the distance: Micciano, Libbiano, Pomarance, Montecastelli and Radicondoli. Throughout the summer, almost every Sunday, village festivals take place here, and historical reenactments are always accompanied by tastings of typical local products. During the spring–summer–autumn period they also organize excursions, trekking and other activities

slides.title: Sleep
slides.text: Spacious, quiet and welcoming spaces. Three apartments, some interconnected, to make you feel truly at home: Acacia, Edera and Gelsomino.

slides.title: Eat
slides.text: An authentic, natural and uncomplicated experience.

slides.title: Play
slides.text: Walk, discover, relax: every corner surprises.

slides.title: Discover
slides.text: Discover medieval villages and don't miss typical events.
